footer.brand_desc: Creative agency specializing in video, photography and graphic design. We bring your most ambitious projects to life.
footer.newsletter_desc: Receive our latest creative news, tips and exclusive offers directly in your inbox.

home.subtitle: The new generation of brand collaborations.
home.feat0_desc: Unique ideas tailored to each brand.
home.feat3_desc: Qualified experts in design, video, digital strategy and social media.
home.mission_desc: BrandX is a communication agency dedicated to transforming your ideas into concrete and impactful projects. Through our innovative services, we create strategies and content tailored to your needs.
home.svc0_desc: Professional video production — clips, commercials and institutional videos in 4K with cinematic rendering.
home.svc1_desc: Innovative digital strategies to develop your visibility and generate concrete results.
home.svc2_desc: Modern and impactful designs for your publications, posters, ads and visual materials.
home.proj0_desc: This project offers a modern and intuitive interface for a food delivery application. The goal was to design a seamless user experience from meal selection to order confirmation. The mockup highlights a responsive design adapted for both mobile and desktop, with simple and efficient navigation.
home.proj1_desc: Premium e-commerce landing page for a high-end audio brand — immersive interface and smooth animations for an elegant shopping experience.
home.proj2_desc: Portfolio website design for a product designer — showcasing projects, client testimonials, and a smooth user journey.
home.marquee: Design  ✦  Dashboard  ✦  Branding  ✦  Visual Identity  ✦  Prototyping  ✦  User Experience  ✦  Design  ✦  Branding  ✦  Visual Identity  ✦  Prototyping  ✦

aboutPage.page_subtitle: Discover the creative team behind your most ambitious projects.
aboutPage.mission_desc: At BrandX, we bring your ideas to life through strong and authentic visuals. Our mission: to create audiovisual content that tells your story with style, emotion and impact.
aboutPage.vision_desc: To become a reference in visual production by combining creativity, excellence and innovation. With each project, we aim to inspire, connect and enhance the identities of our clients.
aboutPage.qui_desc: BrandX is a creative studio driven by passion and attention to detail. We bring your ideas to life through photo shoots, video editing and visual storytelling.
aboutPage.proc0_desc: We start each project with a listening and understanding phase of your needs, to create content in your image.
aboutPage.proc1_desc: We build a clear vision: moodboard, storyboard, locations… Every detail is thought through to reflect your universe.
aboutPage.proc2_desc: Once on the ground, our team captures the essence of your project, then brings your images to life with careful and creative editing.
aboutPage.test0_quote: A professional, creative and attentive team. BrandX captured exactly what I wanted to convey through my video.
aboutPage.test1_quote: Impeccable result, a real attention to detail. I recommend without hesitation for all your visual projects.
aboutPage.test2_quote: An exceptional collaboration from start to finish. The team understood our vision immediately and delivered beyond our expectations.
aboutPage.test3_quote: The quality of the visuals and the attention to every detail made all the difference for our brand launch campaign.
aboutPage.test4_quote: BrandX brought a fresh perspective to our project. The creative direction was spot-on and the execution flawless.
aboutPage.test5_quote: Working with BrandX was a game-changer for our digital presence. Professional, creative, and highly responsive.

swipePage.hero_subtitle: Swipe, connect with passionate creators and turn every match into an original and high-performing collaboration. Quickly find the ideal talent and create innovative campaigns that will captivate your audience.
swipePage.card_obj_text: Looking for creative collaborations with brands, influencers...
swipePage.step0_desc: Install BrandX and discover new collaborations.
swipePage.step1_desc: Sign up and enter your creative needs — sector, budget, project type — for personalized suggestions.
swipePage.step2_desc: Browse creative profiles. Swipe right for a match, left to skip. Simple and intuitive.
swipePage.step3_desc: Once matched, start the collaboration — brief, planning, delivery. All from the app.
swipePage.cta_subtitle: Discover profiles, swipe and create unique collaborations.
